prompt:
Create a premium aesthetic editorial portrait inspired by modern romantic photography. Vertical 9:16 composition with a deep teal and blue textured gradient background. Add large bold white typography in the background, partially hidden behind the subjects, creating a stylish layered depth effect.

Place a happy young couple in the foreground in monochrome black-and-white tones, standing naturally and taking a selfie together. The man has curly messy hair, beard, relaxed oversized white shirt, layered chains, and a joyful candid smile. The woman has curly hair, glasses, casual sleeveless outfit, and is smiling warmly while looking at him. Natural chemistry, candid emotions, and soft body language.

Across the middle of the image, add flowing translucent blue silk waves or smoky fabric ribbons moving horizontally for a dreamy cinematic atmosphere. Include soft flying white doves and tiny glowing butterflies around the subjects. Add realistic green plants and leaves in the bottom foreground for layered depth and artistic framing.

Lighting should be soft, diffused, and cinematic with subtle shadows and glossy highlights. Overall mood should feel romantic, peaceful, artistic, modern, and dreamy. High-end magazine aesthetic, ultra detailed, clean composition, realistic skin textures, monochrome characters contrasting against rich blue tones, premium editorial photography style.
